prediction.reasoning: NEE (NextEra Energy) is a stable utility stock with historically low volatility around 15-20% annually. Using a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated daily volatility of 1.2% and slight positive drift reflecting utility sector stability and dividend yield support, the 20-day prediction shows modest upward bias with expanding confidence intervals reflecting increasing uncertainty over time. The relatively tight intervals reflect the defensive nature of utility stocks compared to growth sectors.
